## Summary
Describe the finding.

## Severity
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Affected area
- [ ] Scanner/policy
- [ ] Lockfile/manifest validation
- [ ] Bundle verification/signatures
- [ ] Release attestation/integrity
- [ ] Other

## Reproduction
Provide exact steps and evidence artifacts.

## Proposed remediation
Describe the expected fix and verification plan.
